sections.content: Welcome to your **free Business Studies** lesson on **Recruitment, selection and training of workers** (2.3). This is syllabus point 2.3 on **Paper 1 (Short Answer and Structured Questions) & Paper 2 (Case Study)** — structured like a premium revision course, with past-paper practice built in.

sections.content: Cambridge 7115 rewards answers tied to the case business — name the firm, quote stimulus data, and balance advantages against disadvantages.
